headline: Jeff Bezos Still Uses A Desk Made Out Of A Door Today: The Hidden Business Lesson Behind It
summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos still uses a door-desk as a symbol of frugality and customer-centric values, despite owning superyachts and mansions.

headline: Elon Musk Had This To Say After Jensen Huang Explained Why No Task Is Beneath Him At The $4.5 Trillion Giant Nvidia: 'I Used To Clean Toilets'
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's hands-on, humble leadership — shaped by his early life as a dishwasher — has empowered employees, driven the company's growth to a $4.5 trillion AI powerhouse, and earned Elon Musk's public praise.

headline: Walmart Founder Sam Walton's Genius Move: Why He Never Gave His 5 Kids Company Stock
summary: Sam Walton's estate planning kept his Walmart stock in a trust, protecting it from divorce courts. This strategy was key to preserving family wealth.

headline: Trump's Offshore Wind Freeze, Musk's Bold Claim About Money And More: This Week In Politics
Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin Taps SpaceX Rival United Launch Alliance's Former CEO To Lead Its New National Security-Focused Unit
summary: Blue Origin, the aerospace company established by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos, has announced the appointment of Tory Bruno as the president of its national security division.

headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Added More To His Wealth In 2025 Than Google Co-Founders Larry Page, Sergey Brin Combined
summary: Elon Musk's net worth grew by $205 billion in 2025, surpassing Google co-founders Larry Page and Sergey Brin's combined wealth.

headline: Elon Musk Warns China Restricting Silver Exports Is 'Not Good'
summary: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk on Saturday warned that China's reported move to restrict exports of silver starting in January is "not good."

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Warren Buffett Is 'The Ultimate Investor' – Market Expert Jay Woods Says Berkshire CEO 'The Stuff Of Legends'
summary: Ahead of Warren Buffett's exit as Berkshire Hathaway CEO, market expert Jay Woods shares his memories of the legendary investor with Benzinga.

headline: Rocket Lab, Micron, And CoreWeave Are Among the Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (Dec. 22-Dec. 26): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: Rocket Lab, Micron, Sandisk, and CoreWeave led last week's large-cap rally—alongside Lumentum, Venture Global, Astera Labs, BioMarin, Ciena, and Karman—on a mix of launch milestones, analyst upgrades, and AI/semiconductor momentum.

headline: Brown Forman, Carvana, And Stellantis Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Losers Last Week (Dec. 22-Dec. 26): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: Last week's big large-cap laggards were led by Brown-Forman, Carvana, and Stellantis, with Starbucks, Samsara, Ryan Specialty, PepsiCo, Texas Pacific Land, On Holding, and General Mills also sliding on analyst actions, labor unrest, and regulatory concerns.

headline: Tim Cook's Nike Buy, AI Smart Glasses, Court Victory And More: This Week In Appleverse

summary: Kevin O'Leary shares life advice on embracing failures and successes for personal and professional growth.

headline: White House Advisor David Sacks Hints At Leaving California Over 'Confiscation Of Net Worth'
summary: David Sacks criticized California's proposed Billionaire Tax as a 5% confiscation of net worth and hinted he might leave the state over it.

headline: Ro Khanna Defends Billionaire Tax, Says Critics Are 'Glossing Over Silicon Valley History' As Peter Thiel, Others Threaten To Leave
summary: Ro Khanna defends a proposed billionaire tax amid warnings from wealthy residents, including Peter Thiel, that they might leave the state.
